query:
-- Look at ALL SasBoss services with UCXcel plans to understand the pattern
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.customerName, s.customerExternalId,
  s.supplierAccount, s.serviceId, s.monthlyCost
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.planName LIKE '%UCXcel%'
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName
LIMIT 20;

FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.planName LIKE '%UCXcel%'
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName
LIMIT 20;
